languages.text: Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски с невиданным рвением возглавила праведную армию фон династии фон Валанциус. После героической смерти в бою с культистами Хаоса ее лика стали почитать за святую икону и поместили его на полковом знамени 32-го. С тех пор однополчане верили, что одно лишь ее имя, произнесенное вслух, надежно хранило их от ереси и порчи.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski led the righteous army of the von Valancius dynasty with unprecedented zeal. After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. After that, fellow soldiers believed that just speaking her name aloud was enough to keep them safe from heresy and corruption.
languages.original_text: Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски с невиданным рвением возглавила праведную армию фон династии фон Валанциус. После героической смерти в бою с культистами Хаоса ее лика стали почитать за святую икону и поместили его на полковом знамени 32-го. С тех пор однополчане верили, что одно лишь ее имя, произнесенное вслух, надежно хранило их от ереси и порчи.

After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. languages.text: 大軍人ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の軍を率いて、かつてないほどの熱意で戦った。混沌の信者との戦いで戦死した彼女は、聖なる偶像として崇められ、32連隊の旗に描かれた。その後、同僚の兵士たちは、彼女の名を口にするだけで、異端や腐敗から身を守れると信じた。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski led the righteous army of the von Valancius dynasty with unprecedented zeal. After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. After that, fellow soldiers believed that just speaking her name aloud was enough to keep them safe from heresy and corruption.

traits.locale_text: 大軍人ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキは、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の軍を率いて、かつてないほどの熱意で戦った。混沌の信者との戦いで戦死した彼女は、聖なる偶像として崇められ、32連隊の旗に描かれた。その後、同僚の兵士たちは、彼女の名を口にするだけで、異端や腐敗から身を守れると信じた。

languages.text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡以无与伦比的狂热统领着冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的正义之师。在与混沌邪教徒的血战中英勇牺牲后，她的肖像被尊为圣像，安放于第32团的团旗之上。自此，她的战友们坚信，只需大声念出她的名字，就足以抵御异端与腐化的侵蚀。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski led the righteous army of the von Valancius dynasty with unprecedented zeal. After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. After that, fellow soldiers believed that just speaking her name aloud was enough to keep them safe from heresy and corruption.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡以无与伦比的狂热统领着冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的正义之师。在与混沌邪教徒的血战中英勇牺牲后，她的肖像被尊为圣像，安放于第32团的团旗之上。自此，她的战友们坚信，只需大声念出她的名字，就足以抵御异端与腐化的侵蚀。

languages.text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski dirigea la vaillante armée de la dynastie von Valancius avec un zèle sans précédent, jusqu'à ce qu'elle périsse lors d'un combat contre des cultistes du Chaos. Après sa mort héroïque, on commença à révérer son portrait comme une icône sacrée et on l'ajouta même à la bannière du 32e régiment. Par la suite, les soldats se mirent à croire qu'il suffisait de prononcer son nom à voix haute pour se protéger de l'hérésie et de la corruption.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski led the righteous army of the von Valancius dynasty with unprecedented zeal. After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. After that, fellow soldiers believed that just speaking her name aloud was enough to keep them safe from heresy and corruption.

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski dirigea la vaillante armée de la dynastie von Valancius avec un zèle sans précédent, jusqu'à ce qu'elle périsse lors d'un combat contre des cultistes du Chaos. Après sa mort héroïque, on commença à révérer son portrait comme une icône sacrée et on l'ajouta même à la bannière du 32e régiment. Par la suite, les soldats se mirent à croire qu'il suffisait de prononcer son nom à voix haute pour se protéger de l'hérésie et de la corruption.

languages.text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski lideró al ejército justo de la dinastía von Valancius con un fervor sin precedentes. Tras su muerte heroica en una batalla contra cultistas del Caos, su imagen se adoró como icono sagrado y se añadió al estandarte del 32.º regimiento. Desde entonces, sus soldados creen que pronunciar su nombre en voz alta es una protección efectiva contra la herejía y la corrupción.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski led the righteous army of the von Valancius dynasty with unprecedented zeal. After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. After that, fellow soldiers believed that just speaking her name aloud was enough to keep them safe from heresy and corruption.

traits.locale_text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski lideró al ejército justo de la dinastía von Valancius con un fervor sin precedentes. Tras su muerte heroica en una batalla contra cultistas del Caos, su imagen se adoró como icono sagrado y se añadió al estandarte del 32.º regimiento. Desde entonces, sus soldados creen que pronunciar su nombre en voz alta es una protección efectiva contra la herejía y la corrupción.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, von Valancius hanedanlığının haklı ordusunu benzeri görülmemiş bir gayretle yönetti. Kaos tarikatçılarına karşı savaşta kahramanca ölümünün ardından sureti, kutsal bir ikon olarak saygı gördü ve 32. Alay'ın sancağına yerleştirildi. Bundan sonra silah arkadaşları, sadece adını yüksek sesle anmanın bile onları kâfirlikten ve yozlaşmadan korumaya yettiğine inandılar.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski led the righteous army of the von Valancius dynasty with unprecedented zeal. After her heroic death in battle against Chaos cultists, her likeness was revered as a holy icon and placed on the regimental banner of the 32nd. After that, fellow soldiers believed that just speaking her name aloud was enough to keep them safe from heresy and corruption.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, von Valancius hanedanlığının haklı ordusunu benzeri görülmemiş bir gayretle yönetti. Kaos tarikatçılarına karşı savaşta kahramanca ölümünün ardından sureti, kutsal bir ikon olarak saygı gördü ve 32. Alay'ın sancağına yerleştirildi. Bundan sonra silah arkadaşları, sadece adını yüksek sesle anmanın bile onları kâfirlikten ve yozlaşmadan korumaya yettiğine inandılar.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski befehligte die rechtschaffene Armee der Dynastie derer von Valancius mit beispiellosem Eifer. Nach ihrem heldenhaften Tod im Kampf mit den Kultisten wurde ihr Antlitz als heiliges Symbol verehrt und auf dem Banner des 32. Regiments verewigt. In der Folgezeit glaubten ihre Soldaten, es würde ausreichen, ihren Namen laut auszusprechen, um sich vor Ketzerei und Verderbtheit zu schützen.
